name: TechNova
description: TechNova is a software company that sells a project management tool called FlowDesk. It helps teams organise tasks, track deadlines, and collaborate remotely.
faqs: Q: How much does FlowDesk cost? A: FlowDesk costs £12 per user per month. There is a free 14-day trial.
Q: Is there a mobile app? A: Yes, FlowDesk is available on iOS and Android.
Q: How do I reset my password? A: Go to the login page and click Forgot Password. You will receive an email within 2 minutes.
Q: Can I cancel anytime? A: Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime with no penalty.
